fields.label: Submittable?
fields.rationale: Most DocTypes are not submittable. Enable only for documents with a draft / submitted / cancelled lifecycle.

fields.label: Naming rule
fields.rationale: Autoincrement is safe when naming intent is unclear. Change if users should see meaningful IDs.

fields.label: Child table?
fields.rationale: Child tables only exist inside a parent DocType. Enable only for repeating rows.

fields.label: Singleton?
fields.rationale: Single DocTypes store exactly one record (e.g. settings). Enable for config-style documents.

fields.label: Permissions
fields.rationale: System Manager full access is the minimum usable default. Add role rows for end users.
